dictionary_name: LocalPinyinIME self-maintained built-in common lexicon v1
intended_distribution: Bundled with LocalPinyinIME source and unsigned development packages as a project-maintained local_core dictionary layer.
source_policy: This v1 lexicon is project-maintained. This update did not import any third-party bulk lexicon, did not access the network, did not scrape web content, and did not use rime-ice, Sogou, Baidu, Microsoft, Google, or other external dictionary files.
frequency_policy: Frequency values are project-maintained relative ranking weights using coarse bands such as 9000, 7000, 5000, and 3000. They are not external corpus statistics and should not be presented as measured language frequency.
review_status: Foundation-stage reviewed for format, duplicate pinyin+word keys, required common entries, and obvious scope violations. Entries have not all received formal linguistic review.
